utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: We will do a quick check .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: You must be a little uncomfortable .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: You are about 80 percent effaced , so you are on your way .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: It still could last a little while longer .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: If you are anxious there are a few ways to help things along .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: Actually , they are things you can do . Just some home remedies , but in my experience I have found that some of them are quite effective .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , we are ready to try anything .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: Okay , there is an herbal tea you can drink .
